en: Aruay, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Aruay, are you home?

ab: Kai yatavanane ku Aruay! Elrenga ku, manemane? lukelanga naw pelaelanga ki Aruay.
ch: B:Aruay不在家耶!我是Elrenga，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告Aruay。
en: Aruay is not at home. I am Elrenga. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: Kayngu, kunay Alazumu si Alayumu, mueleba!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Alazumu和Alayumu，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Alazumu and Alayumu, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: Basadha ku, wakela ku silape ki Ugusane.
en: I am Basadha , I am here for Ugusane.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Maulaynga su kaikela, mabarengera ku musuane.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Alazumu, walela ku nay kivavange iya.
en: Alazumu, I am here to play with you.

ab: Kirimua mudaane, maulaynga ku tamukalavane li musuane.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Kikay pauvurasi li, ani palalava kane!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Abuala! kikay duku li ka madru ki angatu, ani palalava kane.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Ala malimeeme kikay madru ki angatu na.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Ala nenea! kikay lredreke li kalapadhanane ani palalava kane!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: Kainaku maka kane ku tianese, naw kane ku lringigu kamani.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.
Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Maelanenga, kikay madru ki angatu ala tuaesebe turamuru.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Naw malra ku acilay paungulu musuane.
en: I will bring you some water.
Thank you.
Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: U! ala sangualreeme si kalimeeme lukaneane.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
